title: phyllanthus cuneifolius
intro: Phyllanthus cuneifolius, also known as the sandpaper bush or the sandpaper tree, is a shrub-like plant native to Australia, known for its rough, sandpapery leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The medicinal properties of Phyllanthus cuneifolius have been shown to provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
